response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No reference lyrics JSON provided for dialogue. 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription performed for the entire video. Utilized on-screen Japanese subtitles as a primary fallback for context and intent verification of the spoken Indonesian. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly synchronized with vocal starts. Aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions used during rapid cross-talk between the three VTubers to maintain clarity and prevent cascading delays. Multi-speaker segments were split into discrete blocks to follow the vocal waveform.

subtitles.original: Satu lagu dari awal udah keren banget kan?
subtitles.english: From the very first song, it's already so cool!

subtitles.original: Parah sih... iya kan?
subtitles.english: That was insane, right?

subtitles.original: Adrenalin banget...
subtitles.english: The adrenaline is really pumping...

subtitles.original: pengen lari aku rasanya nih!
subtitles.english: I feel like I want to start running!

subtitles.original: Woi woi woi... mau ke mana?
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey! Where are you going?

subtitles.original: Iya iya stop stop stop!
subtitles.english: Whoa, whoa, stop, stop, stop!

subtitles.original: Nanti keringetan loh, nanti keringetan!
subtitles.english: You're gonna get all sweaty!

subtitles.original: Kalau Kaela gimana?
subtitles.english: How about you, Kaela?

subtitles.original:
Aduh seru banget... aku enggak nyangka sih
sampai aku bisa ada di sini ya.
subtitles.english:
Man, it's so much fun... I never thought
I'd actually be standing here.

subtitles.original:
Tapi ini ngomong-ngomong konser ini masih panjang
banget... jadi kalian tetap semangat ya sampai akhir!
subtitles.english:
By the way, this concert is still far from over...
so stay hyped until the very end!

subtitles.original: Semangat semangat semangat!
subtitles.english: Let's give it our all! Give it our all!

subtitles.original:
Eh tapi ngomongin konser dari tadi...
emang pada tahu judul konsernya apa?
subtitles.english:
Hey, we've been talking about the concert...
but does everyone know the title of the concert?

subtitles.original: Judul konser kita kali ini adalah... Chromatic Future!
subtitles.english:
The title of our concert this time is...
Chromatic Future!

subtitles.original: Ada yang tahu enggak artinya apa? Ayo absen!
subtitles.english: Does anyone know what it means? Raise your hands!

subtitles.original: Nah ini, Kobo paling tahu!
subtitles.english: Now this... Kobo definitely knows!

subtitles.original: Iya... yang jelasin yang paling tinggi!
subtitles.english: Right... the tallest person should explain it!

subtitles.original: Iya, yang jelasin yang paling tinggi! Let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah, the tallest person explains! Let's go!

subtitles.original: Gitu ya... ya udahlah...
subtitles.english: Oh, that's how it's gonna be? Fine...

subtitles.original:
Nih ya guys buat kalian yang belum tahu...
Chromatic Future itu artinya masa depan yang berwarna-warni.
subtitles.english:
Alright guys, for those who don't know...
Chromatic Future means a colorful future.

subtitles.original: Jadi karena hololive Indonesia kan udah 5 tahun nih...
subtitles.english:
Since hololive Indonesia is now reaching
its 5th anniversary...

subtitles.original: Kita sama-sama dari hari satu sampai sekarang...
subtitles.english:
We've all been walking together
from day one until today!

subtitles.original:
Nah jadi itu untuk ke depannya kita tuh juga harapannya
kita bisa nyiptain waktu dan memori yang berwarna-warni...
subtitles.english:
So for the future, our hope is that we can continue
to create colorful times and memories...

subtitles.original: Sama seluruh fans dari hololive Indonesia!
subtitles.english: Together with all the fans of hololive Indonesia!

subtitles.original: Betul! Kaela Kovalskia! Catat tuh!
subtitles.english: Exactly! Kaela Kovalskia! Take note of that!

subtitles.original: Iya iya iya...
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah, yeah...

subtitles.original:
Nah kalian sekarang udah pada tahu kan...
karena tadi udah dijelasin sama Kaela.
subtitles.english:
Well, now you all know, right?
Since Kaela just explained it.

subtitles.original:
Kalau gitu konsernya kan udah mulai nih...
kalian mau nge-post soal konser ini di medsos
jangan lupa hashtag #holoIDChromaticFuture ya!
subtitles.english:
Since the concert has already started, if you post
on social media, don't forget the hashtag
#holoIDChromaticFuture!

subtitles.original: Karena kita pengen banget lihat kalian tuh...
subtitles.english: Because we really want to see your...

subtitles.original: apa sih... pengen lihat semangat kalian!
subtitles.english: how do I put it... we want to see your passion!

subtitles.original: Iya itu betul banget! Ya enggak?
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's exactly right! Right?

subtitles.original: Jangan typo, jangan typo!
subtitles.english: Don't make any typos! Don't make any typos!

subtitles.original: Asyik! Share ke semua, oke?
subtitles.english: Awesome! Share it with everyone, okay?

subtitles.original:
Jadi... tapi jujur deh kalian tuh pas dibilang
kita bakal konser loh di Indonesia...
kalian pada kaget enggak sih?
subtitles.english:
But honestly... when you were told that we'd be having
a concert in Indonesia... were you guys surprised?

subtitles.original: Halo? Ada yang dengerin?
subtitles.english: Hello? Is anyone listening?

subtitles.original: Betul!
subtitles.english: Right!

subtitles.original:
Aku setuju juga... aku merasakan empati
terhadap ini adik saya Zeta.
subtitles.english:
I agree too... I feel a sense of empathy
towards my little sister Zeta.

subtitles.original: Empati iya iya...
subtitles.english: Empathy, yeah, yeah...

subtitles.original: Kalau Kaela gimana, Kaela Kovalskia?
subtitles.english: How about you, Kaela Kovalskia?

subtitles.original:
Aku juga waktu itu enggak nyangka banget
kayak 'Hah? Beneran? Nih riil nih?' gitu kan.
subtitles.english:
I also couldn't believe it at the time, I was like
'Huh? Seriously? Is this for real?'

subtitles.original:
Kayak... loh bisa gitu akhirnya mana udah bersembilan
di Indonesia pula ya kan... keren banget!
subtitles.english:
I mean... finally all nine of us can perform in
Indonesia together... it's so cool!

subtitles.original: Keren banget! Iya!
subtitles.english: It's so cool! Yeah!

subtitles.original:
Ini kan konser pertama hololive Indonesia
yang bersembilan.
subtitles.english:
Yes, this is the very first concert
with all nine members of hololive Indonesia.

subtitles.original:
Sebenarnya tuh enggak hanya ini tuh momen terbesar
dan terpenting juga untuk fans hololive Indonesia
tapi seluruh dunia juga pasti bakalan nonton enggak sih?
subtitles.english:
Actually, this is a huge moment for hololive
Indonesia fans, but surely the whole world
will be watching too, right?

subtitles.original: Iya enggak?
subtitles.english: Right?

subtitles.original: Jawab!
subtitles.english: Answer me!

subtitles.original: Iya iya makasih makasih semuanya!
subtitles.english: Yes, yes! Thank you, thank you everyone!

subtitles.original:
Tapi tentu aja ini pencapaiannya enggak bakal
cuma sampai di sini aja kan?
subtitles.english:
But of course, this achievement
won't just stop here, right?

subtitles.original:
Jadi next-nya mungkin kita bisa apa ya...
dominating the world gitu! We are ready!
subtitles.english:
So next, maybe we can...
dominate the world! We are ready!

subtitles.original: Ready ready ready ready!
subtitles.english: Ready, ready, ready, ready!

subtitles.original:
Betul banget Kaela, Zeta! Selain dari dukungan fans,
kita juga mau mengucapkan terima kasih untuk semua
sponsor yang mendukung terjadinya konser ini!
subtitles.english:
Exactly, Kaela and Zeta! Besides the support from fans,
we also want to thank all the sponsors
who made this concert possible!

subtitles.original:
Makasih! Makasih makasih makasih semuanya!
Thank you thank you thank you!
subtitles.english:
Thank you! Thank you, thank you everyone!
Thank you, thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original:
Eh tapi ngomong-ngomong di konser ini kayaknya
ada yang beda enggak sih? Hmm... Ela kamu nyadar enggak?
Soalnya kamu paling peka enggak sih?
subtitles.english:
By the way, doesn't something feel different?
Hmm... Ela, did you notice?
Since you're the most observant, right?

subtitles.original:
Sadarlah... kalau Kobo mah enggak bakalan sadar.
Nih nih nih nih...
subtitles.english:
Of course I did... Kobo probably wouldn't notice.
Look at this, look at this...

subtitles.original:
Yang beda tuh kali ini tuh model kita!
Ini model baru nih!
subtitles.english:
What's different this time is our models!
These are new models!

subtitles.original: Gemes banget! Lucu lucu!
subtitles.english: So cute! So cute!

subtitles.original:
Kameranya dekatin ke aku! Nih nih nih...
kalian mau lihat keimutan Kobo nih nih nih...
subtitles.english:
Bring the camera closer to me! Look, look...
you want to see Kobo's cuteness, look at this!

subtitles.original: Ini nih... o-shiri!
subtitles.english: Look at this... my butt!

subtitles.original: Eh... oh eh eh eh...
subtitles.english: Whoa... whoa, whoa, whoa...

subtitles.original:
Woi woi woi... ini kamera diambil Kobo semua
enggak sih? Ini ke aku! Aku juga! Aku juga!
Jangan Kobo doang!
subtitles.english:
Hey, hey... Kobo's taking all the camera time,
isn't she? Point it at me! Me too! Me too!
Not just Kobo!

subtitles.original:
Satu, dua, tiga... udah selesai!
Kameranya balik ke Kobo lagi!
subtitles.english:
One, two, three... and done!
Camera back to Kobo again!

subtitles.original:
Stop stop stop stop stop! Mulai mulai mulai...
semua kamera diambil!
subtitles.english:
Stop, stop, stop, stop, stop! There she goes again...
taking all the camera time!

subtitles.original: Oke oke oke... kalau gitu...
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay... well then...

subtitles.original:
Aduh aduh aduh... sampai kehabisan napas.
Jangan berebutan di depan konser!
subtitles.english:
Man, I'm out of breath.
Don't fight over the camera during the concert!

subtitles.original: Iya... iya iya iya...
subtitles.english: Okay... yeah, yeah, yeah...

subtitles.original: Iya loh... Zeta kalau marah takut loh!
subtitles.english: Right... Zeta is scary when she's angry!
